channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Wes Moore voices opposition to Trump’s plans for Medicare spending reductions
item.description: During a recent campaign event in Maryland, Governor Wes Moore criticized former President Donald Trump for signaling potential cuts to Medicare as part of his proposed federal budget adjustments. Moo...

item.title: Researchers identify FTL1 protein as a key driver of brain aging and memory decline in mice
item.description: Scientists at the University of California, San Francisco have identified a protein called FTL1 that appears to play a central role in brain aging. In aging mice, higher levels of FTL1 were linked to ...

item.title: Angus Sheldrick to miss Gather Round after elbowing incident against Reuben Ginbey
item.description: Sydney Swans midfielder Angus Sheldrick has been handed a one-match suspension for an off-the-ball incident involving West Coast Eagles defender Reuben Ginbey. The clash occurred during the final quar...

item.title: Economists question impact of Ramaphosa’s investment pledges
item.description: Economists have cast doubt on President Cyril Ramaphosa’s claims about the impact of South Africa’s investment conferences, saying the headline pledge figures do not appear to have translated into str...

item.title: Man faces mischief charge for tampering with fire alarm in Sault Ste. Marie
item.description: A man in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, has been charged with mischief following an incident involving interference with a fire alarm system. According to local authorities, emergency services were called...

item.title: Pakistan and Türkiye Strengthen Judicial Collaboration Through Formal MoU
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan is set to host a delegation from Türkiye’s Constitutional Court from April 6 to 9, marking an important milestone in judicial cooperation between the two brotherly nation...

item.title: Key Developments Across Africa: Mozambique Debt Clearance, South African Crime Deployment, and Health Challenges
item.description: On 2 April 2026, several notable developments across Africa were reported. Mozambique has fully settled its $630.1 million debt with the International Monetary Fund (IMF), positioning itself as the on...

item.title: Tanzania PM Office Requests Parliament to Approve 12.5 Trillion Shillings Budget for Government Operations and Development
item.description: Dodoma — The Office of the Prime Minister (PMO) together with its affiliated institutions have officially asked Parliament to approve a budget of 12.5 trillion Tanzanian Shillings for the 2026/2027 fi...

item.title: Kenya Expresses Support for UAE Amid Reports of Gulf Infrastructure Attacks Linked to Iran's IRGC
item.description: Kenya has pledged its support and solidarity with the United Arab Emirates (UAE) after a series of attacks on critical infrastructure across Gulf countries, allegedly carried out by Iran’s Islamic Rev...

item.title: Suspected measles outbreak in Bangladesh kills nearly 100 children, government ramps up vaccination
item.description: Bangladesh has reported that suspected measles may have killed around 98 children in just three weeks, according to official data released on Sunday. The health ministry’s figures show that suspected ...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee alleges BJP bringing outsiders and paid supporters to influence West Bengal polls
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister and Trinamool Congress leader Mamata Banerjee has accused the BJP of bringing paid supporters from states like Bihar and Uttar Pradesh to influence the upcoming Assembly ele...

item.title: Pressure Mounts on CS Opiyo Wandayi Over Eldoret Fuel Scandal
item.description: In Uasin Gishu county, calls are intensifying for Energy and Petroleum Cabinet Secretary Opiyo Wandayi to resign following a major fuel scandal affecting his ministry. The controversy erupted after se...

item.title: PSV Clinches Third Consecutive Dutch Title Amid Feyenoord Draw
item.description: PSV Eindhoven have secured the Eredivisie title for a third consecutive season after Feyenoord could only manage a goalless draw against Volendam. PSV had already strengthened their position with a 4-...

item.title: Police arrest 23 PTI members during protest over fuel prices in Karachi
item.description: On Sunday, Karachi police detained 23 members of the PTI, including two former lawmakers, following a protest near the Karachi Press Club (KPC) against rising fuel prices and general inflation. The PT...

item.title: Zanzibar Revenue Authority exceeds March tax collection target
item.description: The Zanzibar Revenue Authority (ZRA) has done well in March 2026 by collecting 100.606 billion shillings, which is 9 per cent above their target of 92.292 billion. This is a big jump from last year wh...

item.title: Silver Religious Artifacts of St. Michael Stolen in San Miguel Church, Bulacan
item.description: In San Miguel town, Bulacan, the silver wings, shield, spear, and sword of the image of Saint Michael the Archangel were reported stolen on Black Saturday. The theft was discovered at around 9 a.m., p...

item.title: Cinemalaya’s ‘Open Endings’ selected for international screenings in Boston and the UK
item.description: The independent Filipino film 'Open Endings', one of the standout entries from last year’s Cinemalaya Film Festival, continues to gain recognition as it heads to major international film festivals in ...

item.title: Fictional 2026 News Reports Mirror Trump-Era Political Tensions
item.description: A fictional news article, purportedly from 2026, has sparked considerable discussion and concern due to its alarming parallels with the political climate of the Trump era. The article, published by th...

item.title: Deadly attacks hit Benue and Chibok communities on Easter Sunday
item.description: On Easter Sunday, tragedy hit two communities in Nigeria. For Mbalom community in Gwer East, Benue State, armed attackers stormed the area, shot residents, and set several houses on fire, killing at l...

item.title: Air India temporarily stops direct flights from New Delhi to Tel Aviv due to continuing regional war
item.description: Amid the intensifying conflict across the Middle East, Air India has decided to suspend all flights between New Delhi and Tel Aviv until May 31, 2026. This measure follows heightened instability in th...
